description: Control automatic plot updates. If set to off, the plot is not automatically updated when changes are made to the model. If no plot name is specified, the current view is assumed.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: itasca.command('plot <name> update <bool>') - no direct Python SDK method

keywords.name: s
keywords.description: Plot name. If not specified, the current view is assumed.

keywords.name: b
keywords.description: Boolean flag: true to enable automatic updates, false to disable.

examples.description: Disable automatic updates for current plot
Enable automatic updates for current plot

notes: For detailed plot item keywords (color-by, cut, transparency, legend), use pfc_browse_reference("plot-items") to list item types and pfc_browse_reference("plot-items ball") for full syntax.
